mapper.select: SELECT sf.object_key AS "objectKey", sf.original_name AS "originalName", sf.file_size AS "fileSize", sf.location FROM sys_file sf WHERE sf.del_flag = '0' AND sf.id = #{id}
SELECT sf.original_name, sf.file_key, sf.location, sf.object_key, sf.file_suffix, sf.file_size, sf.file_hash FROM sys_file sf WHERE sf.del_flag = '0' AND sf.file_hash = #{hashCode}
select t1.bucket, t1.object_key, t1.id, exists (select 1 from sys_file a where a.del_flag = '0' and a.file_hash = t1.file_hash) as retain from sys_file t1 where t1.del_flag = '1'

delete from sys_file where del_flag = '1' and id in
#{item}
